query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN entregue = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as entregues, SUM(CASE WHEN entregue = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nao_entregues, MIN(dataEntrega) as primeira_entrega, MAX(dataEntrega) as ultima_entrega FROM cases_sucesso;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN entregue = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as entregues, SUM(CASE WHEN entregue = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nao_entregues, MIN(dataEntrega) as primeira_entrega, MAX(dataEntrega) as ultima_entrega FROM cases_sucesso;
